| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE
May 31st, 2017
Del. Scott Lingamfelter Endorses Jill Vogel for Lieutenant Governor
Retired Army Colonel Praises Vogel for Getting Things Done
WARRENTON, VA - Today, Senator Jill Vogel, Republican candidate for Lieutenant Governor, announced the endorsement of Delegate Scott Lingamfelter, a retired Army Colonel whose strong conservative record and passion for veterans' issues has made him a leading Republican voice in Virginia's General Assembly.
"Jill Vogel is an authentic conservative running on a record of proven results and promises kept," said Delegate Scott Lingamfelter. "Jill's leadership was instrumental in establishing the Office of Veterans Affairs which helped consolidate Virginia's veterans services under one umbrella to provide better-coordinated, higher-quality services. Jill stands up for our values and gets things done, and that is why I am endorsing Jill and asking all Republicans to vote for her on June 13th."
"I am honored to have the support and confidence of Scott Lingamfelter," responded Senator Jill Vogel. "In the years we have served together, I have always been impressed by Scott's ability to get results. Years ago, Scott and I both pushed for a comprehensive audit of VDOT. When his bill passed and became law, Virginia found $1.4 billion in misplaced money, which we were able to put to work because Scott stepped up to demand better accountability in one of our most important core functions of government."Delegate Scott Lingamfelter is a decorated Colonel in the US Army (retired) who currently represents portions of Prince William and Fauquier Counties. During his tenure, Lingamfelter has been steadfast in his defense of the Second Amendment and Virginia's hunting and fishing heritage, [receiving in 2013 the highest recognition given by the NRA](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001hbS_d15iJlZfByz88aJ0HcqtiiUjHPBR5MtDnEV3IMhMZl5Z0oIxJHdkspddCCvn9SBFhFwQAnfwnNPDBLa5N9m7hngfcGrFeeipV30waisFLrDlSDnKhf05G8-Bwf4yAi7fxKny5rDrZGFPSjkyZBSdwtBZo3sfAgTiJZSfMnzeHynlVT2PwX1ursHf8mChn1AOycjWNLZdb15XJNStCw3ld3wxv0pQy1HkmlbtqZ5u3etf6bamQvWZP9FfZG2CaYpViLD3IWqB0DtJ3b7RKA==&c=dMARQqeTcnTCTu0JKu6pj5FPC4H-FZuS547-oK9tOxl01EuraHH3ng==&ch=Cyxb2Yoa_iXPYlxLbDS5UOHM2iXckJvINVwqhtxmZSbZ7MZ3bN3IzA==), the Carter-Knight Freedom Fund Award, for his work in repealing Virginia's gun rationing law in 2012. A believer in effective government, Lingamfelter carried and successfully passed legislation auditing VDOT and ultimately finding $1.4 billion in forgotten and misappropriated funds which was [put to use building roads](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001hbS_d15iJlZfByz88aJ0HcqtiiUjHPBR5MtDnEV3IMhMZl5Z0oIxJHdkspddCCvnrlLbYifGyFoJ1eTKcn3QMQG0wI47ebx3viUC7Jq33F4nMX0a-uBpF6JJqYbJ9a4MtMnkBU72VXNhqz3DIDtuvW__hzkgZBCV7SdCaMxnWGdKiMCygf4VfmVmyekTD3G5jGIh-SH7LZ1YSN8TPFB8EFZoza9k373VvtdXQfQS2d7w1U4NpZPNxjuypsaNm5ckKU67aJ-fddt7LN9YcsUTb9OkxR-hBCZg&c=dMARQqeTcnTCTu0JKu6pj5FPC4H-FZuS547-oK9tOxl01EuraHH3ng==&ch=Cyxb2Yoa_iXPYlxLbDS5UOHM2iXckJvINVwqhtxmZSbZ7MZ3bN3IzA==).

clean_body: Hi Derek, Republicans are united. Yesterday I met with House members to discuss bills that will be voted on tomorrow (Thursday, June 1st). I am pleased to say that the Tri-Chairs of the House Republican Alliance (HRA) spoke with one voice and endorsed SB3, SB8, and SB66. Republicans are leading on these important issues of life, education, and election law. SB-66-FN: Includes "fetus" in the definition of "another" for purposed of certain criminal offenses. Click here to learn more about SB66 ( ) SB-8-FN: Relative to school attendance in towns with no public schools Click here to learn more about SB8 ( ) SB-3: Relative to domicile for voting purposes to help close the domicile loophole. Click here to learn more about SB3 ( ) Our work is not done yet. I need your help. Please call your State Representative today ( ), Republican or Democrat, and urge them to vote in the affirmative for these pieces of legislation. Thank you for your continued diligence on these issues! Jeanie Forrester Chairman Share your Robly campaign on Facebook ( ) Share your Robly campaign on Twitter ( ) ( ) ( ) ( ) footer image

Team,

Speaker of the House Paul Ryan says that Donald Trump's new budget is "right on the target."

That's all you need to know about just how devastating Trump's budget will be for working families.

It's obscene:
* $5 billion in cuts to public education
* $73 billion in cuts to Social Security
* $191 billion in cuts to food stamps
* $610 billion in cuts to Medicaid (and that's in addition to the $880 billion the House Republicans are slashing in their so-called "health care" bill)

Those are just a few of the highlights. What else gets cut? Money for children's health care, money to combat the opioid epidemic, money for medical research, money for the Corporation for Public Broadcasting, and so much more.

**This budget is "right on the target" only if the target is to sucker-punch kids, seniors, the poor and the sick. If the Republicans make good on this budget, they could deliver the final blow to America's working families.**

[**The people who will get hit by this budget don 't have time for you to wait, so take a sec for something that matters. name: Tom Perez
subject: re: big investment in Georgia
body:
Help us keep fighting.
---
**Before our May deadline at midnight, pitch in $3 or more to help elect more Democrats.
**[DONATE](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cd6a/4067b0a/29b840020/7e696835/449419609/VEsH/ "https://my.democrats.org/May-Deadline-2017-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=em_20170531_tp_nd2&source=em_20170531_tp_nd2&refcode=em_20170531_tp_nd2")****
Derek --

Earlier this month, we made a big investment in Georgia Democrats that's allowing the state party to hire ten new field organizers who are specifically focused on turning out African Americans, Asian Americans, and Latinos who didn't vote last year for Jon Ossoff in the special election on June 20th.

They'll use every hour of these next three weeks organizing volunteers, knocking on doors, and hitting the phones to get Jon's message out and help every eligible voter in Georgia's 6th congressional district cast their ballot for Jon.

**[Hiring ten people makes a huge difference, and it's only possible because of grassroots supporters like you who chip in what you can to support our party. Before tonight's deadline, help make sure we can make more investments like this -- in Georgia and around the country.](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052cd6a/4067b0a/29b840020/7e696832/449419609/VEsE/ "https://my.democrats.org/May-Deadline-2017-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+Hiring+ten+people+makes+a+huge+differenc&utm_campaign=em_20170531_tp_nd2&source=em_20170531_tp_nd2&refcode=em_20170531_tp_nd2")**

With everything that's happening in Washington right now -- a health care repeal that would hurt millions of Americans on the verge of passage, a budget that would make unprecedented cuts to Medicaid and education, and worse news about Trump's collusion with Russia trickling out every day -- we have to take advantage of every opportunity to gain ground in Congress.

If we can elect a Democrat in Georgia's 6th district -- which has gone Republican for almost 40 years -- we'll be one step closer to taking back our majority and sending a message that we're ready to fight in every election this year and in 2018.

This is a race that will go down to the wire -- so let's keep the momentum going for Jon and Democratic candidates all over the country. Pitch in $3 or whatever you can to help power our movement today.

subject: I believe in you
body:
#
Team --
There are folks who believe that our victory isn't possible because I don't have a famous last name or the ability to write our campaign a big check.
I'm not one of them. Because I know that as long as we're in this together, none of that matters.
So far, we've powered this campaign with over 6,000 individual contributions online from activists and advocates like you who still believe it's possible for "we the people" to make a difference in our government and in our leadership.
[**If you 're ready to stand up and be counted as a member of our movement, chip in whatever you can afford before our end of month deadline at midnight tonight >>**](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb333f/9e00690/4a37c63e/240372b8/3672871233/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ag-may2017?refcode=em20170531-express-ne-nb")
This is about so much more than just our campaign -- it's about demonstrating the power of the people, no matter what the cynics and pundits have to say. It's about proving that we're in this for the long haul - to win for the people who are counting on us.
Together, let's show the special interests the true power of the people.

| | **Trump, Jr. on Joe 's race: "[G]ive my father the extra vote [he needs]... A vote that would be all too important..."\- _Eagle Country_ 99.3, 5/9/17**
| [](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c265a/7377f838/3635ebb8/51fb7ff9/659582985/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-mayeom?refcode=20170531nd&amount=10")
---
Peter,

Republicans are already bringing in the big guns to attack Joe. Earlier this month, Donald Trump, Jr. spoke at the Indiana GOP's annual dinner, where he called on them to **take Joe 's seat and give his father a 60 seat supermajority in the Senate!**

Peter, protecting this seat from becoming another yes vote for the Trump-GOP agenda will take one of the biggest grassroots efforts in Indiana's history. **[Can you chip in $5 before TONIGHT's end-of-month deadline to help Joe stand strong against the GOP onslaught?](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c265a/7377f838/3635ebb8/51fb7ff9/659582985/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-mayeom?refcode=20170531nd&amount=10")**

Two of Joe's expected opponents are just as extreme as Trump. One, Luke Messer, has been called "one of Trump's biggest cheerleaders". The other, Todd Rokita, openly brags about voting to "support President Trump's agenda." **Hoosiers need someone who will fight for them -- not Trump and his special interest backers.**

We're getting closer to our end-of-month goal of 500 donors, but we still need 145 more people to step up and make sure we get there. **[Can you pitch in $5 so we don't miss our goal?](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c265a/7377f838/3635ebb8/51fb7ff9/659582985/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-mayeom?refcode=20170531nd&amount=10")**

Thanks for making sure we send a vote for Indiana, not Trump, to the Senate.

\-- Donnelly for Indiana

Peter, protecting this seat from becoming another yes vote for the Trump-GOP agenda will take one of the biggest grassroots efforts in Indiana's history. "" Two of Joe's expected opponents are just as extreme as Trump. One, Luke Messer, has been called "one of Trump's biggest cheerleaders". The other, Todd Rokita, openly brags about voting to "support President Trump's agenda." Hoosiers need someone who will fight for them -- not Trump and his special interest backers. We're getting closer to our end-of-month goal of 500 donors, but we still need 145 more people to step up and make sure we get there. "" Thanks for making sure we send a vote for Indiana, not Trump, to the Senate. \-- Donnelly for Indiana "" | Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana P.O. Box 891, Indianapolis, IN 46206 ""

**Before our midnight deadline, split a donation between Jon Ossoff and the DNC to help elect Jon in Georgia's 6th district and Democrats all over the country.

| __
Democrats and our grassroots supporters aren't sitting idly by while Trump and his allies try to roll back the progress we've made over the past eight years.

Instead, we are uniting in opposition, flooding town hall meetings, and engaging in record numbers in protests, online activism, and community mobilization.

**It 's incredible, and the best part is--we aren't slowing down. The stakes are too high.**

Chris Van Hollen is leading the charge to ensure that Democrats win big in the U.S. Senate next year. But he needs your help.

Attacks on our democratic legitimacy are coming from every angle. Winning will stop them. | [](http://welcome.legitaction.com/page/m/66cf46f0/1c469400/2652e56/354a053/1334492862/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/legitpac_op?refcode=20170531_r4w_EOM_msg2_ND&utm_medium=email&utm_source=feingold&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=20170531_r4w_EOM_msg2_ND&source=20170531_r4w_EOM_msg2_ND") Friend, It's pretty simple:
1. They're attacking our democratic legitimacy.
2. To restore our democratic legitimacy, we must beat them at the ballot box.
3. That's what we're going to do.

And we're going to start by doing it in June's House special election in Georgia and gubernatorial primary in Virginia. To help Jon Ossoff and Tom Perriello win those races, we need to raise $10,000 for them in May. That means we only have to raise another $3,590 by midnight. [_**Contribute $3 now, before the clock strikes midnight, to help reach $10,000 for Jon Ossoff and Tom Perriello in May.**_](http://welcome.legitaction.com/page/m/66cf46f0/1c469400/2652e56/354a050/1334492862/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/legitpac_op?refcode=20170531_r4w_EOM_msg2_ND&utm_medium=email&utm_source=feingold&utm_content=2+-+Contribute+3+now+before+the+clock+strike&utm_campaign=20170531_r4w_EOM_msg2_ND&source=20170531_r4w_EOM_msg2_ND") Sometimes it feels like the attacks on our democratic legitimacy are coming from every angle. Winning is one of the most important ways to stop them. Thank you for stepping up today, Russ Feingold | [CONTRIBUTE](http://welcome.legitaction.com/page/m/66cf46f0/1c469400/2652e56/354a051/1334492862/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/legitpac_op?refcode=20170531_r4w_EOM_msg2_ND&utm_medium=email&utm_source=feingold&utm_content=3+-+CONTRIBUTE&utm_campaign=20170531_r4w_EOM_msg2_ND&source=20170531_r4w_EOM_msg2_ND")

Team,

Tonight, we face a critical FEC deadline. Let us explain why this one matters so much:

Senate Republicans are drafting their version of the GOP health care repeal plan RIGHT NOW. When they come back from recess on Monday, it'll be time for vulnerable Republicans to decide whether to back the Senate bill.

That means this week is make or break for us to show Republicans the price they'll pay for backing the GOP's disastrous repeal plan -- and one crucial way for us to do that is with a huge show of enthusiasm from grassroots Democrats before our midnight FEC deadline.

**We 're still short of our $150,000 goal, team, but if just 3 people step up from your neighborhood right now, we'll get there. Pitch in a TRIPLE-MATCHED gift before midnight:**

**[Pitch in $1 IMMEDIATELY>>](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab4?refcode=DPE-20170531-Deadline-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=1")

[Pitch in $5 IMMEDIATELY >>](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab4?refcode=DPE-20170531-Deadline-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=5")

[Pitch in $25 IMMEDIATELY >>](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab4?refcode=DPE-20170531-Deadline-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=25")

[Pitch in $35 IMMEDIATELY >>](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab4?refcode=DPE-20170531-Deadline-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=35")

[Or donate another amount.](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab4?refcode=DPE-20170531-Deadline-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**

Republicans will be watching our next FEC report closely. If we fall short, they'll be able to push forward with less resistance.

But if we can announce a historic show of support from Democrats like you, it'll show them just how committed we are to stopping Obamacare repeal.

**Pitch in a triple-matched gift right now:**

[**http://dscc.org/may-fec-deadline**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dsccab4?refcode=DPE-20170531-Deadline-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

Thanks for stepping up at this key moment,

Team DSCC

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. name: Samantha Gross (via vanhollen.org)
subject: movement on the ground
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
| __
If all you do is watch what's going on in Washington, it can be pretty disheartening.

Every day it's more bad news--another environmental regulation slashed, another huge tax cut for the rich proposed, another erratic comment tweeted that threatens our national security. Just last week, Donald Trump released a budget plan that prioritizes the wealthiest and special interests over hardworking families in Maryland and nationwide.

But as a member of Chris's campaign staff, I get to witness firsthand some of the amazing things happening on the ground to fight back.

People are organizing events, sit-ins and town halls--and they're helping to build the infrastructure we need to win in 2018.

The thing is, we need your help to stay strong and grow our movement. We only need 124 more grassroots donors to step up before midnight tonight in order for us to hit our crucial May budget goal for the 2018 Victory Fund we set up to support candidates across the country. [**Can you make a donation of $7 or more now?**](http://action.vanhollen. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cvh-may17?refcode=em053117_2&amount=25.00&recurring=12&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20906&city=Silver Spring&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+Can+you+make+a+donation+of+ask+or+more+n&utm_campaign=em053117_2&source=em053117_2")

There is only one road forward--we must oust the GOP majority next year. If we don't... well, it's not even an option. We must.

When I see the dedication and the passion of Chris's grassroots supporters, I know we can do it. But it's going to take your help right now to make it happen.

Can you give $7 or more before the end-of-month budget deadline at midnight tonight?

[**http://action.vanhollen.org/2018VictoryFund**](http://action.vanhollen. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cvh-may17?refcode=em053117_2&amount=25.00&recurring=12&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20906&city=Silver Spring&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+httpactionvanhollenorg2018VictoryFund&utm_campaign=em053117_2&source=em053117_2")

Thanks so much,

Samantha

---

I just checked today's fundraising numbers, and we're only $11,516 away from our goal.

Leigh K. Warren
